product_overview: A Hinglish-speaking AI companion that feels like a close friend, remembers the user across chats, and provides a warm, non-judgmental conversation experience. The backend supports authentication, persistent memories, persona settings, safety screening, and streamed AI messaging.
core_goals: Deliver a natural Hinglish AI chat experience with SSE streaming responses
Persist and retrieve user memories across conversations
Provide secure JWT-based authentication and user-specific data access
Enforce message rate limits server-side for free-tier usage
Screen every message for crisis/safety issues before any AI generation
Allow users to manage persona settings and memory facts via authenticated APIs
Support operational readiness with health checks and monitoring-friendly API behavior

features.name: Health Check
features.description: Provides a lightweight liveness probe for backend uptime and deployment monitoring.
user_flows: GET /health -> Receive 200 with {"status":"ok"} for a healthy backend
GET /health on an unavailable service -> Receive no 200 response / network error indicating service is down

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Verifies Supabase JWTs, creates user records on first login, and protects user-specific routes.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/otp/send with valid phone or email -> Receive 200 confirmation from OTP provider flow -> POST /api/v1/auth/otp/verify with valid OTP -> Receive 200 with JWT session and create public.users row if first login
POST /api/v1/auth/otp/verify with expired or invalid OTP -> Receive 401 or verification error response from auth flow
GET /api/v1/memories with missing Authorization header -> Receive 401 Authentication required
GET /api/v1/persona with expired JWT -> Receive 401 Authentication required

features.name: Chat / Messaging API
features.description: Accepts user messages, runs safety and rate-limit checks, streams AI responses, and returns conversation history for authenticated users.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/message with valid content and no JWT -> Receive 200 text/event-stream tokens and done event because anonymous messaging is allowed

POST /api/v1/message with a protected user session and safe content -> Run safety check -> Pass rate limiter -> Store user message -> Receive 200 text/event-stream with streamed Hinglish assistant response -> Save assistant message after stream completes
POST /api/v1/message with crisis-related content -> Run safety check -> Trigger crisis path -> Skip OpenAI response generation -> Receive crisis SSE response and log a safety event
POST /api/v1/message after daily quota is exhausted -> Run safety check -> Pass/skip to rate limiter -> Receive 429 Rate limit exceeded
GET /api/v1/messages/{conversation_id}?page=1 with valid JWT and owned conversation_id -> Receive 200 with paginated ConversationHistoryResponse
GET /api/v1/messages/{conversation_id}?page=1 with missing or invalid JWT -> Receive 401 Authentication required

features.name: Memories API
features.description: Lets authenticated users list and delete extracted memory facts tied only to their own account.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/memories with valid JWT -> Receive 200 with ordered MemoriesResponse containing all saved memory facts
DELETE /api/v1/memories/{memory_id} with valid JWT and owned memory_id -> Receive 204 No content and the memory is removed
DELETE /api/v1/memories/{memory_id} with valid JWT but a non-owned or missing memory_id -> Receive 404 Memory not found
GET /api/v1/memories with missing Authorization header -> Receive 401 Authentication required

features.name: Persona API
features.description: Retrieves and updates companion persona settings, including companion name, tone, expectation, and optional open field.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/persona with valid JWT and no existing persona row -> Receive 200 PersonaResponse using default Arjun values
POST /api/v1/persona with valid JWT and persona fields -> Receive 200 PersonaResponse and upsert persona settings for the current user
POST /api/v1/persona with valid JWT and updated persona fields -> Receive 200 PersonaResponse with latest stored values and updated companion_name in users
GET /api/v1/persona with missing Authorization header -> Receive 401 Authentication required

features.name: Rate Limiter
features.description: Enforces a server-side daily message quota for free users and anonymous sessions.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/message with a free user under quota -> Rate limiter allows request -> Receive streamed 200 response
POST /api/v1/message with a free user at or above daily quota -> Rate limiter blocks request -> Receive 429 Rate limit exceeded
POST /api/v1/message with an anonymous session that has exceeded its daily anon quota -> Rate limiter blocks request -> Receive 429 Rate limit exceeded

features.name: Safety Check
features.description: Screens every incoming message for keyword and semantic crisis signals before AI generation and logs safety events.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/message with a message containing a crisis keyword -> Safety check triggers keyword path -> Skip AI call -> Return crisis response
POST /api/v1/message with ambiguous but harmful semantic content -> Safety check triggers semantic path -> Skip AI call -> Return crisis response
POST /api/v1/message with OpenRouter/OpenAI classification failure during safety check -> Default to triggered=true -> Return crisis response rather than fail open

features.name: Chat / Messaging API
features.description: SSE-streamed AI chat with safety check, rate limiting, memory injection, and anonymous support

endpoints.description: Send a message and receive SSE-streamed AI response. Anonymous allowed (no JWT required).
Paginated conversation history for authenticated user

features.name: Memories API
features.description: Read and delete extracted memory facts for the authenticated user

endpoints.description: List all memory facts for the current user, ordered by category
Delete a specific memory fact (ownership enforced)

features.name: Persona API
features.description: Get and upsert companion persona settings (name, tone, expectation, open_field) per user

endpoints.description: Retrieve saved persona; returns Arjun defaults if no row exists
Upsert persona settings for the current user

features.name: Authentication
features.description: JWT verification via Supabase secret (HS256) with network fallback; lazy public.users row creation

features.name: Rate Limiter
features.description: Per-user and per-anon-session daily message quota enforced server-side

features.name: Safety Check
features.description: Keyword + semantic check on every message before AI call; logs safety events

known_limitations.issue: GET /persona returns defaults only when result.data is None; falsy empty dict also falls through correctly but depends on maybe_single() behaviour
known_limitations.impact: Edge case if Supabase returns empty object instead of None

known_limitations.issue: Anonymous users get no conversation history or memory persistence
known_limitations.impact: By design; anon sessions are stateless
